category_sources: source_facts.description says it is an efficient mock generator for Swift.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official uber/mockolo project; the project name is presented as Mockolo in normal title case.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub project, so the README is the official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/uber/mockolo; per instruction, repo was not re-evaluated.
